ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALIABADI, NASSER ALIABADI, FLORISA
ORDER GRANTING ROMEO L. AGLORO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES

DISCOVERY 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF ROMEO AGLORO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS NASSER ALIABADI AND FLORISA ALIABADI SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO THE FOLLOWING DISCOVERY ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 22, 2013: FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE); REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE); REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE); AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE). RESPONSES MAY BE SERVED ELECTRONICALLY. PLAINTIFF ROMEO AGLORO'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $790 IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. REBECCA WOODSON, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John Aspelin, Aspelin & Bridgman, 415.296.9812, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff ROMEO AGLORO's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. Defendants NASSER ALIABADI and FLORISA ALIABADI shall serve verified responses, without objection, to the following discovery on or before February 22, 2013: Form Interrogatories (Set One); Requests for Admissions (Set One); Requests for Production of Documents (Set One); and Special Interrogatories (Set One). Responses may be served electronically. Plaintiff ROMEO AGLORO's request for sanctions in the amount of $790 is GRANTED. Order signed. Rebecca Woodson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
